ogTitle: Jamisontown vs Jaspers Brush: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Jamisontown and Jaspers Brush.
heading: Jamisontown vs Jaspers Brush — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Jamisontown, New South Wales and Jaspers Brush, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Jaspers Brush has a lower overall climate risk score (32/100) compared to Jamisontown (42/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Jamisontown or Jaspers Brush safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Jamisontown has a flood risk score of 55/100, while Jaspers Brush scores 36/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Jamisontown scores 20/100 for bushfire risk. Jaspers Brush scores 18/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Jamisontown or Jaspers Brush?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Jaspers Brush has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.8% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
